TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Conv-farming_marang_furayang

S.FORM: e masama’an tu kiya panay tu piliso’ isu tayra i oma’.
S.TRANSL: 你去田裡看水稻怎麼樣了。
What happened to the rice last time you went to the farm?

S.FORM: ca ho kaku piliso’.
S.TRANSL: 我還沒有去看。
I haven’t checked yet.

S.FORM: piala haca aku tuni kalitang la’enu nuya lopas.
S.TRANSL: 只有去摘長豆，就在桃樹下。
I only picked the snap beans under the peach trees.

S.FORM: hay matini sa kalaorad latek ca’ay kafangcal ku heci nu panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.TRANSL: 常常下雨的關係，可能稻子的果實不太好，我的想法。
Because of the frequent rain, probably the rice is not good. I think so.

S.FORM: anu masama’an ku misu a pinengneng tura panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.TRANSL: 你看過稻子的想法如何，我的想法是這樣。
What do you think after seeing the rice? That’s what I think.

S.FORM: hay a ma’anen ku fana’ samaha’enmaha’en ku aniniay a miheca’an a.
S.TRANSL: 是，有什麼辦法呢，既然是這樣的季節。
Well, what can I do? The weather is like this.

S.FORM: a hiya nu nu nu rakat nu fali ita kira mamaha’en haca.
S.TRANSL: 這就是氣候的變化，就是這樣的結果。
This is how the weather changes. This is the only way.

S.FORM: latek itini i sakaenem a fulad.
S.TRANSL: 大概在六月。
Maybe in June.

S.FORM: alatek a mipanay tu sa ku maku.
S.TRANSL: 可能就要割稻了，我判斷。
It is time to harvest, I think.

S.FORM: ta sulingaen ita ku malulalusidang a mipanay u pawutiwuti.
S.TRANSL: 我們開始整理，作為收割時的用品，用一袋袋的麻袋。
We should arrange the stuff for harvest, like sacks.

S.FORM: masadak tu i paputal sa ku maku harateng.
S.TRANSL: 拿出來曬穀場外面，我的想法。
Take them out, I think.

S.FORM: hay maha’en ku maku harateng.
S.TRANSL: 是，我也這麼想。
Yeah, I think so, too.

S.FORM: anu tayraaw i nonghuei.
S.TRANSL: 如果到農會呢？
What if we store it at the farmers’ association?

S.FORM: anu itiraen itira ci papohan a mipawali.
S.TRANSL: 如果到Papoh家去晒呢？
How about drying it at Papoh’s house?

S.FORM: u milicay kaku tu falucu’ isu.
S.TRANSL: 我要問問你的想法。
I am asking for your opinion.

S.FORM: maku harateng a simanay icuwa tu malecad tu sa kaku ali.
S.TRANSL: 我的想法，無所謂，哪裡都是一樣的。
I think it doesn’t matter. Everywhere is the same to me.

S.FORM: hay anu matira nga’ay tu ku suwal isu e matini.
S.TRANSL: 如果你說的這樣可以。
If you say so, okay.

S.FORM: anu ma sulinga tu ku suwal nu mita tatusa haw i a nga’ayay i ca kaitira ku i nukay ku nga’ay.
S.TRANSL: 把我們的話整理一下，我想在農會不是最好嗎？
To sum up, wouldn’t it be better if (we do it) at the farmers’ association?

S.FORM: ca tu pisaliawliaw a miolong sa ku falucu’ nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 不用再扛來扛去的。
We don’t have to carry them around, I think so.

S.FORM: ura saka a maha’en ku suwal aku milicay i tisuwanan.
S.TRANSL: 所以我想問問你的想法。
Therefore, I want to know your opinion.

S.FORM: maku wa a mipanay ca’ay pi patayra i nukay kira maku a panay.
S.TRANSL: 我割稻後稻子不會送到農會。
As for my rice, I won’t store it at the farmer’s association.

S.FORM: mmh acukemashan aku ci kapiyasan ni kakaenen itira.
S.TRANSL: 我要吃的寄放在Kapiyas那裡。
I will leave my share at Kapiyas’ place.

S.FORM: hay manga’ay tu anu matira ku falucu’ isu a.
S.TRANSL: 是的，可以。如果你這樣想。
Well, that’s okay, if that’s what you think.

S.FORM: ma’anen ku pi hiya tu misu a falucu’.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道如何（改變）妳的心。
I don’t know how to change your mind.

S.FORM: manga’ay tu itira ci katay.
S.TRANSL: 放Katay那也好。
It’s okay that you leave your portion at Katay’s place.

S.FORM: san miala sa tu fulac ca’ay tu karoray a miala tu malukakaenen tu itini i luma’ a kura sa ku harateng manga’ay tu maha’en ku falucu’ isu.
S.TRANSL: 去拿的時候，去拿家裡要吃的糧食就不會很辛苦，這樣，既然你的意思是這樣。
That won’t be tiring when you (try to) get the food, if that’s what you think.

S.FORM: e matini ya nipalumaan tiya ropas haw.
S.TRANSL: 現在我們種的那些桃子，...。
The peaches that (we) grow....

S.FORM: na tayra tu kisu minengneng.
S.TRANSL: 你去看過了嗎？
Did you go and take a look?

S.FORM: nengnenghan aku sakahangan sa.
S.TRANSL: 我看整片都紅的。
I saw that they were all red.

S.FORM: tiwashan aku mapuhed tiwashan aku mapuhed awaay ku osaw nu faw a micucuk.
S.TRANSL: 敲下一個爛一個，敲下一個爛一個，沒有不被蟲叮的。
They were all rotten; the rest were infested with worms.

S.FORM: pakunirahan tu aku kira.
S.TRANSL: 我就這樣放著不管。
I didn’t manage to deal with it.

S.FORM: hay u ca’ay ka paiw nu mita u mamatiratira haca mafaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有噴藥，那樣子所以長蟲。
We didn’t spray pesticides, so the worms grew.

S.FORM: tayra kiya maku inacila i takuliaw a minengneng.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天去takuliaw看過。
I went to Takuliaw yesterday to check.

S.FORM: su’elin ca’ay kafangcal ku heci nu lopas anini tuna mehica’an kalafaw.
S.TRANSL: 真的今年的桃子的果實不好，都長蟲。
The peaches this year are not really good. So many worms.

S.FORM: hatiyatiya ca’ay ka pi paiw kita urasaka ca’ay kanga’ay ku heci nang ningra.
S.TRANSL: 那樣子，我們沒有噴藥，所以他的果實不好。
Well, we didn’t spray pesticides, so his fruits are not good.

S.FORM: ira kiya ni alaan aku inacila i.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天有去採。
I picked some yesterday.

S.FORM: maedeng ca pakamutep kiya kiya fangcalay ku heci.
S.TRANSL: 差不多不到十個好的。
The good ones were less than ten.

S.FORM: falahan tu isu.
S.TRANSL: 你丟了嗎？
Did you throw them away?

S.FORM: ca’ayay maala ku panukay.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有拿回來。
I didn’t bring them back here.

S.FORM: anuhoni anu masama’an tu anu mami culu’ kita tu ’amutu.
S.TRANSL: 等一下看怎麼樣，我們要去運水泥時。
(Let's see) later, when we go to carry the concrete.

S.FORM: munengaw tu kuya hiya ira ci falu cicu’ong tu kuya kuya putaw.
S.TRANSL: 長出來了，開花（這裡語誤），出芽了，那個葡萄。
The grapes sprouted.

S.FORM: alahan tu aku kuya kuhtingay satahepu tuya lukut.
S.TRANSL: 我帶了覆蓋山蘇的黑布幔。
I took a piece of black cloth to cover the plant.

S.FORM: nga’ay patu’urhan tu ni hiya tu u safang saka ku kira.
S.TRANSL: 可以把它舖上作為網子，我這樣想。
We can do it this way. As a net, I think.

S.FORM: manga’ay tu ira ku safang itira i luma’.
S.TRANSL: 可以的話，家裡有網子。
There is a net at home.

S.FORM: anu ca sapima’an ni lekal kuya safang alaan tu ka patayni ta sangaan tu ita kura rangra nura putaw sa ku falucu’ aku.
S.TRANSL: 如果lekal沒有拿去幹麻的話。把它拿來，我們作葡萄的棚子，我這樣想。
If Lekal didn’t take it, we’ll use it as a shed for the grapes. That’s what I think.

S.FORM: ta u roma sa tu icila mi ala ci mayaw tura suta’ itira i ni kuocintien kyami.
S.TRANSL: 另外，上次mayaw買了地在郭金田那，不是嗎?
Didn’t Mayaw purchase a piece of land there at Kuo Chintien’s?

S.FORM: kala’enu na kasapad.
S.TRANSL: 在Kasapad他們的下面。
Below Kasapad’s.

S.FORM: mmh ma‘eci tu aku ci kuocintienan ku payci tu ipan sa’an.
S.TRANSL: 我把錢寄給郭金田了，寄了一半。
I have sent money to Kuo Chintien, half of it.

S.FORM: anucila maharek tu kura siokencio ta patayra haca kaku tu payci.
S.TRANSL: 過幾天等到處理完所有權狀後，我還要再拿錢過去。
A few days later when the title deed is done, I will pay the balance.

S.FORM: latek minukay kami itiya sa kira.
S.TRANSL: 可能我們那時候回來。
We will probably come back then.

S.FORM: sakapina a fulad kura sapinukay nira.
S.TRANSL: 她們大概是幾月回來？
In which month are they coming back?

S.FORM: unini a fulad kiya.
S.TRANSL: 就是這個月。
This month.

S.FORM: tuna sakaenem.
S.TRANSL: 這個六月嗎？
This June?

S.FORM: hay tuna sakaenem sakalima ka.
S.TRANSL: 是，這個六月，或是五月。
Right, this June, or probably May.

S.FORM: sostala uya suwal isu icila e anu matira mama‘aca tu ni mayaw kura suta’.
S.TRANSL: 所以你那次提過的，Mayaw買了那塊地後，...。
So last time you mentioned that Mayaw already bought that piece of land.

S.FORM: anu tayra sa kita mifunsia sa kuya suwal isu.
S.TRANSL: 我們去噴藥，妳這樣說過。
We are going to spray pesticides. That is what you said.

S.FORM: anu fangcal tu ku rumi’ad haw i tayra sa tu kita mifunsia sa kuna niharatengan tu aku.
S.TRANSL: 看什麼時候天氣好，我們去噴藥，我是這樣子想。
When the weather is good, we’ll go there to spray pesticides. That’s what I think.

S.FORM: anu awa ku limaw isu aka pacici maketeraw ka’emangay wawa saka ku kira.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒有時間不要勉強，妳的小孩會罵。
If you do not have time, we will not force you. Your child will be angry.

S.FORM: u mima’an haca tu masamatini awa ku tatayalen tu masamatini manga’ay tu tayra mifunsia sa kaku.
S.TRANSL: 這時候有什麼事，沒有什麼要忙的啊，我想還是去噴藥好了。
There is nothing to do. We will go there to spray pesticides.
